## `accessibleWrapper`  *(utility · Core)*

Wraps a child with accessibility annotations (ARIA-style). See [`13_Accessibility.md`](13_Accessibility.md) for the full property set.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `child` | `Widget` | yes | — | Wrapped subtree. |
| `accessibility` | `object` | no | — | `{ label, hint, role, live }` — mirrors §13. |

---

## `alertDialog`  *(dialog · Core · v1.0)*

**Aliases:** `alert`

Modal alert with an optional title, an optional body (string or widget),
and a list of labeled action buttons. Dispatched via the `dialog` action
(`{ "type": "dialog", "dialog": { "type": "alertDialog", ... } }`). The
runtime renders it as a `Dialog` surface scoped to the current navigator
(not the root navigator), so tapping an action pops only the dialog.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `title` | `string` | no | — | Dialog title shown at the top. |
| `content` | `string | Widget` | no | — | Dialog body. When a string, rendered as a single `Text`. When a widget, rendered as-is. |
| `dismissible` | `boolean` | no | true | Whether tapping outside the dialog closes it. |
| `actions` | `array<object{ label: string, variant: string, primary: boolean, onTap: Action }>` | no | — | Action buttons rendered in the dialog footer. Each entry:   - `label` (required): button text.   - `variant`: one of `text` / `elevated` / `outlined` / `filled`; default `text`.   - `primary`: highlights the button as the default action.   - `onTap`: the action fired on press. The runtime pops the dialog     BEFORE executing `onTap`, so handlers that trigger state changes or     navigation do not race with the dialog dismissal.  |

### Examples

#### `basic_confirm`

Cancel / Confirm pair with a string body.


```json
{
  "type": "alertDialog",
  "title": "Delete item",
  "content": "This cannot be undone.",
  "actions": [
    { "label": "Cancel", "variant": "text" },
    { "label": "Delete", "variant": "filled", "primary": true }
  ]
}
```

#### `legacy_short_name`

Legacy `type: alert` accepted as alias for `alertDialog`.


```json
{ "type": "alert", "title": "Info", "content": "OK?" }
```

#### `unknown_variant_is_ok_for_now`

Phase 1 does not enforce `variant` enum on action entries; nested shape is permissive.


```json
{
  "type": "alertDialog",
  "actions": [ { "label": "Close", "variant": "ghost" } ]
}
```

#### `wrong_type` — **expected: validation_error** at `#/oneOf`

Root `type` must be `alertDialog` or alias.


```json
{ "type": "warning" }
```

## `align`  *(layout · Core)*

Aligns a single child at a specified alignment.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `alignment` | `string` | no | "center" | `topStart`, `topCenter`, `topEnd`, `centerStart`, `center`, `centerEnd`, `bottomStart`, `bottomCenter`, `bottomEnd`. Defaults to `center` when omitted. |
| `child` | `Widget` | yes | — | Aligned widget. |

#### `prose_example_0`

```json

  "child": { "type": "icon", "icon": "close" } }
```

## `animatedContainer`  *(animation · Core)*

Container with implicit animations on property changes.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `duration` | `number` | no | 300 | Animation duration in milliseconds. |
| `curve` | `string` | no | "easeInOut" | Animation curve. |
| `decoration` | `object` | no | — | Decoration; changes are animated. |
| `onEnd` | `Action` | no | — | Fired when the animation completes. |
| `child` | `Widget` | no | — | Child widget. |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "animatedContainer",
  "duration": 500,
  "curve": "easeInOut",
  "width": "{{expanded ? 300 : 100}}",
  "height": "{{expanded ? 200 : 50}}",
  "padding": { "all": 16 },
  "decoration": {
    "color": "{{expanded ? '#2196F3' : '#E0E0E0'}}",
    "borderRadius": 8
  },
  "onEnd": {
    "type": "state", "action": "set",
    "binding": "animationComplete", "value": true
  },
  "child": { "type": "center",
             "child": { "type": "text", "text": "Animated" } }
}
```

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `src` | `string` | no | — | Image URL; if absent, falls back to `label`. |

## `banner`  *(display · Core)*

Persistent message banner at the top of a section or page.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `message` | `string` | yes | — | Banner text. |
| `severity` | `string` | no | "info" | `info`, `success`, `warning`, `error`. |

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
  "type": "banner",
  "message": "Your trial expires in 3 days",
  "severity": "warning",
  "actions": [
    { "label": "Upgrade",
      "onTap": { "type": "navigation", "action": "push", "route": "/pricing" } },
    { "label": "Dismiss",
      "onTap": { "type": "state", "action": "set",
                 "binding": "showBanner", "value": false } }
  ]
}
```

## `bottomNavigation`  *(navigation · Core)*

**Aliases:** `bottomNav`, `bottomnavigationbar`

Bottom navigation bar. Each item's text field is `label`.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `selectedIndex` | `number | binding` | no | 0 | Currently selected index. Defaults to 0 when omitted. |
| `items` | `NavItem[]` | yes | — | `{ icon, label, route? }` entries. |
| `onChange` | `Action` | no | — | Fired when selection changes. |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "bottomNavigation",
  "selectedIndex": "{{currentTab}}",
  "items": [
    { "icon": "home",     "label": "Home" },
    { "icon": "search",   "label": "Search" },
    { "icon": "person",   "label": "Profile" }
  ],
  "onChange": {
    "type": "state", "action": "set",
    "binding": "currentTab", "value": "{{event.index}}"
  }
}
```

## `box`  *(layout · Core · v1.0)*

**Aliases:** `container`

Generic single-child container that applies size, padding, margin, and a
decoration (background color, border, shadow, gradient, borderRadius). Most
commonly used as a styled wrapper around any child widget.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `width` | `number` | no | — | Fixed width in logical pixels. When omitted, the box shrinks to its child's width. |
| `height` | `number` | no | — | Fixed height in logical pixels. When omitted, the box shrinks to its child's height. |
| `minWidth` | `number` | no | — | Minimum width constraint. Honored independently of `width`; a child wider than `minWidth` is allowed. |
| `maxWidth` | `number` | no | — | Maximum width constraint. Caps the child's width regardless of intrinsic size. |
| `minHeight` | `number` | no | — | Minimum height constraint. |
| `maxHeight` | `number` | no | — | Maximum height constraint. |
| `padding` | `string` | no | — | Space inside the box, between the border and the child. Accepts an M3 spacing token shorthand (`xxs` / `xs` / `sm` / `md` / `lg` / `xl` / `2xl` / `3xl` / `4xl`, or any custom slot in `theme.spacing`) — resolved through `theme.spacing.<token>` to a uniform inset — or the legacy EdgeInsets object form.  |
| `margin` | `EdgeInsets` | no | — | Space outside the box, between the box and its parent. |
| `alignment` | `string` | no | — | Alignment of the child inside the box when the box is larger than the child. |
| `color` *(aliases: `backgroundColor`)* | `Color` | no | — | Solid background color. Shorthand for `decoration.color`; mutually exclusive with `decoration`. |
| `decoration` | `object{ color: Color, borderRadius: number, border: object, boxShadow: array<object>, gradient: object }` | no | — | Visual decoration. When set, do NOT also set top-level `color` — the runtime treats `decoration` as authoritative.  |

### Children

- kind: `single` · key: `child`

### Examples

#### `sized_decorated_no_child`

Sized + decorated + padded, without a child. Validates via schema alone.


```json
{
  "type": "box",
  "width": 200,
  "height": 80,
  "padding": { "all": 12 },
  "decoration": { "color": "#2196F3", "borderRadius": 8 }
}
```

#### `child_is_box`

Child is another `box`. Self-contained within the Phase 1 registry.


```json
{
  "type": "box",
  "child": { "type": "box", "width": 40, "height": 40, "color": "#FF4081" }
}
```

#### `unknown_type` — **expected: validation_error** at `#/oneOf`

`type` value must be `box` or a declared alias.


```json
{ "type": "not-a-real-widget" }
```

## `button`  *(input · Core)*

Interactive button. The canonical label field is `label`.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `label` *(aliases: `text`)* | `string` | yes | — | Button text. |
| `variant` *(aliases: `style`)* | `string` | no | "elevated" | `elevated`, `filled`, `outlined`, `text`, `icon`. |
| `elevation` | `string` | no | — | Shadow elevation. Accepts either a numeric dp value or an M3 elevation token shorthand (`level0` … `level5`) that resolves through `theme.elevation.<token>.shadow`. Honored only by the `elevated` variant; ignored by `filled`/`outlined`/`text`/`icon`.  |
| `icon` | `string` | no | — | Optional leading icon name. |
| `enabled` | `boolean` | no | true | Whether the button is interactive. |
| `onTap` | `Action` | no | — | Tap handler. |
| `onDoubleTap` | `Action` | no | — | Double-tap handler. |
| `onLongPress` | `Action` | no | — | Long-press handler. |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "button",
  "label": "Submit",
  "variant": "elevated",
  "onTap": { "type": "tool", "tool": "submitForm" }
}
```

## `calendar`  *(advanced · Core · v1.0)*

Calendar view for date selection and event display.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `selectedDate` | `string | binding` | no | — | Currently selected date (ISO 8601 string, or binding to a string). |
| `events` | `binding` | no | — | Array of `{ date, title, color? }` |
| `firstDate` | `string` | no | — | Earliest selectable date (ISO 8601). |
| `lastDate` | `string` | no | — | Latest selectable date (ISO 8601). |
| `view` | `string` | no | month | Calendar display granularity. |
| `onChange` | `Action` | no | — | Fired on date selection; `event.value` is ISO date |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "calendar",
  "selectedDate": "{{selectedDate}}",
  "events": "{{calendarEvents}}",
  "firstDate": "2020-01-01",
  "lastDate": "2030-12-31",
  "view": "month",
  "onChange": {
    "type": "state", "action": "set",
    "binding": "selectedDate", "value": "{{event.value}}"
  }
}
```

## `canvas`  *(advanced · Core · v1.3)*

General-purpose vector drawing via an ordered command array. All numeric and color properties support binding expressions, enabling data-driven graphics (progress rings, custom indicators, composable chart primitives).

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "canvas",
  "width": 300,
  "height": 200,
  "backgroundColor": "#FFFFFF",
  "commands": [
    { "op": "rect", "x": 10, "y": 10, "width": 100, "height": 80,
      "fill": "#FF5722", "cornerRadius": 8 },
    { "op": "circle", "cx": 200, "cy": 100, "radius": 40,
      "fill": "{{app.color}}", "stroke": "#333333", "strokeWidth": 2 },
    { "op": "arc", "cx": 60, "cy": 150, "radius": 30,
      "startAngle": 3.14, "endAngle": "{{3.14 + (app.progress / 100) * 3.14}}",
      "stroke": "#4CAF50", "strokeWidth": 4, "strokeCap": "round" },
    { "op": "line", "x1": 10, "y1": 190, "x2": 290, "y2": 190,
      "stroke": "#E0E0E0", "strokeWidth": 1 },
    { "op": "path", "d": "M 10 10 L 90 10 L 90 90 Z",
      "fill": "rgba(33,150,243,0.2)", "stroke": "#2196F3", "strokeWidth": 1 },
    { "op": "text", "text": "{{app.label}}", "x": 10, "y": 180,
      "fontSize": 14, "color": "#333333", "textAlign": "start" },
    { "op": "image", "src": "bundle://icons/logo.png",
      "x": 250, "y": 10, "width": 40, "height": 40, "opacity": 0.9 }
  ]
}
```

## `card`  *(display · Core)*

Elevated single-child container.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `elevation` | `string` | no | 1 | Shadow elevation. Accepts either a numeric dp value or an M3 elevation token shorthand (`level0` … `level5`) which resolves through `theme.elevation.<token>.shadow`.  |
| `margin` | `EdgeInsets` | no | — | Outer margin. |
| `shape` | `string` | no | — | Shape of the card surface. M3 shape token shorthand (`extraSmall` / `small` / `medium` / `large` / `extraLarge` / `full` / `none`) resolves through `theme.shape.<token>`. Object form `{ type: "rounded", radius: 12 }` is also accepted.  |
| `color` *(aliases: `backgroundColor`)* | `Color` | no | — | Card surface color. |
| `child` | `Widget` | yes | — | Card content. |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "card",
  "elevation": 2,
  "margin": { "all": 8 },
  "shape": { "type": "rounded", "radius": 12 },
  "child": { "type": "text", "text": "Card content" }
}
```

## `chart`  *(advanced · Core · v1.0)*

Data visualization widget with multiple chart types.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `chartType` | `string` | yes | — | Chart visualization style. |
| `data` | `object | array` | yes | — | Canonical `{ labels: string[], datasets: Dataset[] }`, or legacy `[{label, value}]` array form. |
| `data.datasets[].label` | `string` | no | — | Dataset label shown in legend |
| `data.datasets[].data` | `number[]` | yes | — | Data points |
| `data.datasets[].borderColor` | `string` | no | theme | Line/border color |
| `data.datasets[].backgroundColor` | `string` | no | theme | Fill color |
| `options` | `object` | no | {} | Rendering options |
| `options.responsive` | `boolean` | no | true | Resize with container |
| `options.animation.duration` | `number` | no | 1000 | Animation duration (ms) |
| `options.legend.position` | `string` | no | top | Legend placement. |
| `width` | `number` | no | — | Fixed width (logical pixels) |
| `height` | `number` | no | — | Fixed height (logical pixels) |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "chart",
  "chartType": "line",
  "data": {
    "labels": ["Jan", "Feb", "Mar", "Apr"],
    "datasets": [
      {
        "label": "Sales",
        "data": [100, 200, 150, 300],
        "borderColor": "#2196F3",
        "backgroundColor": "rgba(33, 150, 243, 0.2)"
      }
    ]
  },
  "options": {
    "responsive": true,
    "animation": { "duration": 1000 },
    "legend": { "position": "top" }
  }
}
```

---

## `checkbox`  *(input · Core)*

Boolean checkbox. Shared rows per §2.6.0; `value` is `boolean`.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `binding` | `string` | no | — | State path bound two-way to the widget value (§2.6.0). Runtime reads/writes this path without requiring an explicit onChange. |
| `value` | `string | number | boolean | object | array` | no | — | One-way initial/display value (§2.6.0). Literal or `{{path}}`; used when `binding` is not set. |
| `enabled` | `boolean` | no | true | Whether the widget accepts user input (§2.6.0). Default `true`. |
| `onChange` | `Action` | no | — | Fired when the widget value changes (§2.6.0). Event payload exposes `event.value`. |
| `label` | `string` | no | — | Optional label. |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "checkbox",
  "label": "Receive notifications",
  "binding": "settings.notifications"
}
```

---

## `checkboxGroup`  *(input · Core)*

Multi-selection checkbox group. Shared rows per §2.6.0; `binding` holds an `array` of selected values (top-level, not per-option).

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `binding` | `string` | no | — | State path bound two-way to the widget value (§2.6.0). Runtime reads/writes this path without requiring an explicit onChange. |
| `value` | `string | number | boolean | object | array` | no | — | One-way initial/display value (§2.6.0). Literal or `{{path}}`; used when `binding` is not set. |
| `enabled` | `boolean` | no | true | Whether the widget accepts user input (§2.6.0). Default `true`. |
| `onChange` | `Action` | no | — | Fired when the widget value changes (§2.6.0). Event payload exposes `event.value`. |
| `options` *(aliases: `items`)* | `Option[]` | yes | — | `{ value, label }` entries. |
| `orientation` | `string` | no | "vertical" | `vertical` or `horizontal`. |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "checkboxGroup",
  "binding": "form.interests",
  "options": [
    { "value": "sports", "label": "Sports" },
    { "value": "music",  "label": "Music" }
  ]
}
```

## `chip`  *(display · Core)*

Compact element representing an attribute, action, or filter.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `label` | `string` | yes | — | Display text. |
| `avatar` | `Widget` | no | — | Leading widget (icon or image). |
| `selected` | `boolean` | no | false | Selected state. |
| `variant` | `string` | no | "filled" | `filled` or `outlined`. |
| `onDelete` | `Action` | no | — | Action when delete icon is tapped. |
| `onTap` | `Action` | no | — | Action when chip is tapped. |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "chip",
  "label": "Technology",
  "avatar": { "type": "icon", "icon": "tag", "size": 16 },
  "variant": "filled",
  "onDelete": {
    "type": "state", "action": "remove",
    "binding": "selectedTags", "value": "Technology"
  }
}
```

Clips a child to a rounded rectangle.

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |

## `codeEditor`  *(advanced · Core · v1.0)*

Syntax-highlighted code editor.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `code` | `string | binding` | yes | — | Code content — literal string or binding. |
| `language` | `string` | no | plaintext | Syntax highlighting language. |
| `theme` | `string` | no | vsLight | Editor color theme. |
| `readOnly` | `boolean` | no | false | Disable editing (syntax highlighting still applies) |
| `showLineNumbers` | `boolean` | no | true | Show gutter line numbers |
| `fontSize` | `number` | no | — | Font size (logical px) |
| `lineHeight` | `number` | no | — | Line height multiplier |
| `tabSize` | `number` | no | 2 | Tab width in spaces |
| `width` | `number` | no | — | Widget width |
| `height` | `number` | no | — | Widget height |
| `backgroundColor` | `string` | no | — | Override theme background |
| `textColor` | `string` | no | — | Override theme default text color |
| `onChange` | `Action` | no | — | Fired on code change; `event.value` is current code |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "codeEditor",
  "code": "{{sourceCode}}",
  "language": "javascript",
  "theme": "vsDark",
  "readOnly": false,
  "showLineNumbers": true,
  "fontSize": 14,
  "lineHeight": 1.5,
  "tabSize": 2,
  "width": 600,
  "height": 400,
  "onChange": {
    "type": "state", "action": "set",
    "binding": "sourceCode", "value": "{{event.value}}"
  }
}
```

## `colorPicker`  *(input · Core)*

Color selection. Shared rows per §2.6.0; `value` is a hex color string.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `binding` | `string` | no | — | State path bound two-way to the widget value (§2.6.0). Runtime reads/writes this path without requiring an explicit onChange. |
| `value` | `string | number | boolean | object | array` | no | — | One-way initial/display value (§2.6.0). Literal or `{{path}}`; used when `binding` is not set. |
| `enabled` | `boolean` | no | true | Whether the widget accepts user input (§2.6.0). Default `true`. |
| `onChange` | `Action` | no | — | Fired when the widget value changes (§2.6.0). Event payload exposes `event.value`. |
| `showAlpha` | `boolean` | no | false | Enable alpha channel. |
| `showLabel` | `boolean` | no | true | Show hex label. |
| `pickerType` | `string` | no | "wheel" | `wheel`, `palette`, `both`. |
| `enableHistory` | `boolean` | no | false | Show recent colors. |

---

## `conditional`  *(layout · Core)*

Renders different branches based on an expression. Two forms are supported: then/else and multi-branch (`switch`/`cases`).

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `condition` | `boolean | binding` | no | — | Boolean literal or boolean-producing expression (then/else form). |
| `then` | `Widget` | no | — | Rendered when `condition` is truthy (then/else form). |
| `else` | `Widget` | no | — | Rendered when `condition` is falsy (then/else form). |
| `switch` | `binding` | no | — | Expression whose value is compared against each case (switch form). |
| `cases` | `array` | no | — | List of `{ value, child }` entries (switch form). |
| `default` | `Widget` | no | — | Rendered when no case matches (switch form). |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "conditional",
  "condition": "{{user.isAuthenticated}}",
  "then": { "type": "text", "text": "Welcome, {{user.name}}!" },
  "else": {
    "type": "button",
    "label": "Sign In",
    "onTap": { "type": "navigation", "action": "push", "route": "/login" }
  }
}
```

#### `prose_example_1`

```json
{
  "type": "conditional",
  "switch": "{{status}}",
  "cases": [
    { "value": "loading", "child": { "type": "progressBar" } },
    { "value": "error",   "child": { "type": "text", "text": "Error: {{errorMessage}}" } },
    { "value": "empty",   "child": { "type": "text", "text": "No data available" } }
  ],
  "default": { "type": "text", "text": "Ready" }
}
```

---

## `customDialog`  *(dialog · Core)*

Dialog with arbitrary widget content.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `child` | `Widget` | yes | — | Dialog body. |
| `dismissible` | `boolean` | no | true | Whether tapping outside dismisses. |

## `dashboard`  *(utility · Core · v1.3)*

Renders a compact dashboard tile — the widget equivalent of the `ApplicationDefinition.dashboard` field (see [`11_Bundle_Metadata.md`](11_Bundle_Metadata.md) §11). Used to embed a dashboard-mode tile inside a page (launcher / app grid scenarios).

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `content` | `Widget` | no | — | Dashboard tile content tree. When omitted the tile renders empty (fallback). |
| `refreshInterval` | `number` | no | — | Auto-refresh period in milliseconds. Omit for static tiles. |
| `onTap` | `Action` | no | — | Fired when the tile is tapped (commonly wired to `openApp` — see [`04_Actions.md`](04_Actions.md) §4.3). |

---

## `dataTable`  *(advanced · Core · v1.0)*

Material-style sortable, selectable data table bound to a row array.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `columns` | ``Column[]`` | yes | — | Column definitions |
| `columns[].key` | `string` | yes | — | Row field key |
| `columns[].label` | `string` | yes | — | Header label |
| `columns[].width` | `number` | no | — | Fixed column width |
| `columns[].sortable` | `boolean` | no | false | Whether column supports sorting |
| `columns[].align` | `string` | no | start | Horizontal text alignment. |
| `rows` | `binding` | yes | — | Array of row objects |
| `selectable` | `boolean` | no | false | Whether rows are selectable |
| `sortColumn` | `binding` | no | — | Current sort column key |
| `sortAscending` | `binding` | no | true | Current sort direction |
| `onSort` | `Action` | no | — | Fired on header tap of a sortable column |
| `onRowTap` | `Action` | no | — | Fired on row tap; `event.row` is the row object |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "dataTable",
  "columns": [
    { "key": "id", "label": "ID", "width": 100 },
    { "key": "name", "label": "Name", "sortable": true },
    { "key": "status", "label": "Status", "align": "center" }
  ],
  "rows": "{{items}}",
  "selectable": true,
  "sortColumn": "{{sortColumn}}",
  "sortAscending": "{{sortAscending}}",
  "onSort": {
    "type": "batch",
    "actions": [
      { "type": "state", "action": "set", "binding": "sortColumn", "value": "{{event.column}}" },
      { "type": "state", "action": "set", "binding": "sortAscending", "value": "{{event.ascending}}" }
    ]
  },
  "onRowTap": {
    "type": "navigation",
    "action": "push",
    "route": "/detail/{{event.row.id}}"
  }
}
```

---

Date input with calendar/text entry modes. Shared rows per §2.6.0; `value` is an ISO date string.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `binding` | `string` | no | — | State path bound two-way to the widget value (§2.6.0). Runtime reads/writes this path without requiring an explicit onChange. |
| `value` | `string | number | boolean | object | array` | no | — | One-way initial/display value (§2.6.0). Literal or `{{path}}`; used when `binding` is not set. |
| `enabled` | `boolean` | no | true | Whether the widget accepts user input (§2.6.0). Default `true`. |
| `onChange` | `Action` | no | — | Fired when the widget value changes (§2.6.0). Event payload exposes `event.value`. |
| `label` | `string` | no | — | Field label. |
| `format` | `string` | no | "yyyy-MM-dd" | Display format. |
| `firstDate` | `string` | no | — | Earliest allowed date (ISO). |
| `lastDate` | `string` | no | — | Latest allowed date (ISO). |
| `mode` | `string` | no | "calendar" | `calendar`, `input`, `both`. |
| `locale` | `string` | no | — | Locale identifier. |

## `datePicker`  *(input · Core)*

Standalone date picker surface. Shared rows per §2.6.0; `value` is an ISO date string.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `binding` | `string` | no | — | State path bound two-way to the widget value (§2.6.0). Runtime reads/writes this path without requiring an explicit onChange. |
| `value` | `string | number | boolean | object | array` | no | — | One-way initial/display value (§2.6.0). Literal or `{{path}}`; used when `binding` is not set. |
| `enabled` | `boolean` | no | true | Whether the widget accepts user input (§2.6.0). Default `true`. |
| `onChange` | `Action` | no | — | Fired when the widget value changes (§2.6.0). Event payload exposes `event.value`. |

## `dateRangePicker`  *(input · Core)*

Date range selection. Exception to §2.6.0: instead of a single `binding`, the range is bound via **two separate properties** — `startDate` and `endDate` — each independently following §2.6.0 two-way semantics (each accepts a literal ISO string, a `{{path}}` expression for read-only display, or a plain state-path string for two-way binding). `firstDate`/`lastDate` remain one-way constraints on the allowed range.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `binding` | `string` | no | — | State path bound two-way to the widget value (§2.6.0). Runtime reads/writes this path without requiring an explicit onChange. |
| `value` | `string | number | boolean | object | array` | no | — | One-way initial/display value (§2.6.0). Literal or `{{path}}`; used when `binding` is not set. |
| `enabled` | `boolean` | no | true | Whether the picker accepts user input. |
| `onChange` | `Action` | no | — | Fired when the range changes. Receives `{{event.value}}` as `{ start, end }`. |
| `startDate` | `string` | no | — | State path bound two-way to the range's start (ISO date). |
| `endDate` | `string` | no | — | State path bound two-way to the range's end (ISO date). |
| `label` | `string` | no | — | Field label. |
| `firstDate` | `string` | no | — | Earliest allowed date (constraint, one-way). |
| `lastDate` | `string` | no | — | Latest allowed date (constraint, one-way). |
| `format` | `string` | no | "yyyy-MM-dd" | Display format. |
| `locale` | `string` | no | — | Locale identifier. |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "dateRangePicker",
  "startDate": "filter.from",
  "endDate": "filter.to",
  "firstDate": "2026-01-01",
  "lastDate": "2026-12-31"
}
```

---

## `decoration`  *(display · Core)*

Wraps a child with a decoration box (color, border, gradient, shadow) without otherwise affecting layout.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `decoration` | `object` | no | — | Nested `{color, borderRadius, border, gradient, boxShadow}`. Alternatively, each key may appear flat at the top level. |
| `color` | `Color` | no | — | Flat shorthand for `decoration.color`. |
| `borderRadius` | `number` | no | — | Flat shorthand for `decoration.borderRadius`. |
| `border` | `object` | no | — | Flat shorthand for `decoration.border`. |
| `gradient` | `object` | no | — | Flat shorthand for `decoration.gradient`. |
| `boxShadow` | `array` | no | — | Flat shorthand for `decoration.boxShadow`. |
| `child` | `Widget` | no | — | Decorated widget. Required when `children` is omitted. |
| `children` | `Widget[]` | no | — | Multiple widgets; runtime wraps them in a linear column. |

Horizontal separator.

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |

## `dragTarget`  *(interaction · Core)*

Drop area that accepts dragged data.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `canDrop` | `binding` | no | — | Expression controlling acceptance. |
| `builder` *(aliases: `child`)* | `Widget` | no | — | Widget rendered as the drop surface. Required when `child`/`children` are omitted. |
| `children` | `Widget[]` | no | — | Multiple widgets; runtime wraps them in a linear column. Mutually exclusive with `builder`/`child`. |
| `onDrop` | `Action` | no | — | Fired on successful drop; `{{event.data}}` is the payload. |

## `draggable`  *(interaction · Core)*

Drag source widget that produces drag data and feedback visuals.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `data` | `any | binding` | yes | — | Payload emitted on drop. |
| `feedback` | `Widget` | no | — | Widget shown while dragging. |
| `childWhenDragging` | `Widget` | no | — | Replacement for the source while dragging. |
| `child` | `Widget` | yes | — | Source widget. |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "draggable",
  "data": "{{item.id}}",
  "feedback": {
    "type": "card",
    "child": { "type": "text", "text": "{{item.name}}" }
  },
  "child": {
    "type": "listItem",
    "title": "{{item.name}}"
  }
}
```

## `drawer`  *(navigation · Core)*

Side navigation drawer. Each item's text field is `label`.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `items` | `DrawerItem[]` | no | — | `{ icon, label, route? }` entries. Required when `children` is omitted. |
| `children` | `Widget[]` | no | — | Custom drawer body widgets. Mutually exclusive with `items`. |
| `header` | `Widget` | no | — | Drawer header widget. |
| `onSelect` | `Action` | no | — | Fired when an item is selected. |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "drawer",
  "items": [
    { "icon": "dashboard", "label": "Dashboard", "route": "/dashboard" },
    { "icon": "settings",  "label": "Settings",  "route": "/settings" },
    { "icon": "person",    "label": "Profile",   "route": "/profile" }
  ],
  "onSelect": {
    "type": "navigation", "action": "push", "route": "{{event.route}}"
  }
}
```

## `errorBoundary`  *(utility · Core)*

Catches render and build errors thrown by descendants and displays a fallback UI. See [`06_Runtime_Contract.md`](06_Runtime_Contract.md) for the exact recovery lifecycle.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `child` | `Widget` | yes | — | Protected subtree. |
| `fallback` | `Widget` | no | — | UI shown when `child` throws. Defaults to a generic error indicator. |
| `onError` | `Action` | no | — | Fired with `{{event.error}}` / `{{event.stack}}` when the boundary captures an exception. |

---

## `errorRecovery`  *(utility · Core)*

Retry-oriented variant of `errorBoundary`. The `handlers` map may route specific error types to distinct fallbacks.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `child` | `Widget` | no | — | Protected subtree. Required when `children` is omitted. |
| `children` | `Widget[]` | no | — | Multiple protected widgets; runtime wraps them in a linear column. |
| `fallback` | `Widget` | no | — | Default UI shown when `child` throws. |
| `handlers` | `object` | no | — | Map of error-type → fallback Widget. |
| `onError` | `Action` | no | — | Fired on capture with `{{event.error}}` / `{{event.stack}}`. |
| `showDetails` | `boolean` | no | false | Whether to render stack/error detail. |

---

## `expanded`  *(layout · Core)*

Flex child that expands to fill available space inside a `linear` parent.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `flex` | `number` | no | 1 | Flex weight. |
| `child` | `Widget` | yes | — | Expanded widget. |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{ "type": "expanded", "flex": 2,
  "child": { "type": "box", "child": { "type": "text", "text": "Fills space" } } }
```

## `fileExplorer`  *(advanced · Core · v1.0)*

File and directory browser.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `items` | `binding` | no | — | Hierarchical `{ name, path, type, children? }` tree. Required when `rootPath`/`files`/`directories` legacy props are omitted. |
| `rootPath` | `string` | no | — | Legacy: root path string; pairs with flat `files` / `directories`. |
| `files` | `string[]` | no | — | Legacy: flat file list (alternative to hierarchical `items`). |
| `directories` | `string[]` | no | — | Legacy: flat directory list (alternative to hierarchical `items`). |
| `showIcons` | `boolean` | no | true | Show file / folder icons |
| `showHidden` | `boolean` | no | false | Show entries whose name starts with `.` |
| `expandAll` | `boolean` | no | false | Expand all folders by default |
| `width` | `number` | no | — | Widget width |
| `height` | `number` | no | — | Widget height |
| `selectedColor` | `string` | no | — | Background color for selected entry |
| `onSelect` | `Action` | no | — | Fired on selection; `event.value` is the selected path |
| `onOpen` | `Action` | no | — | Fired on activation (double-tap / Enter); `event.value` is the path |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "fileExplorer",
  "items": "{{fileTree}}",
  "showIcons": true,
  "showHidden": false,
  "expandAll": false,
  "width": 300,
  "height": 500,
  "selectedColor": "#E3F2FD",
  "onSelect": {
    "type": "state", "action": "set",
    "binding": "selectedFile", "value": "{{event.value}}"
  },
  "onOpen": {
    "type": "tool",
    "tool": "openFile",
    "params": { "path": "{{event.value}}" }
  }
}
```

## `flow`  *(utility · Core)*

Lightweight flowing layout that places each child along the main axis with fixed `spacing`, falling back to a new run when space is exhausted. A simpler alternative to `wrap` (§2.4.11) for spacer-style chains.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `children` | `Widget[]` | yes | — | Flow children. |
| `direction` | `string` | no | "horizontal" | `horizontal` or `vertical`. |
| `spacing` | `number` | no | 8 | Gap between children in logical pixels. |
| `alignment` | `string` | no | "start" | `start`, `center`, `end`. |

## `form`  *(input · Core)*

Container that manages validation state for its child inputs.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `children` | `Widget[]` | yes | — | Form field widgets. |
| `showErrorsOn` | `string` | no | "submit" | `submit`, `change`, `blur`. |
| `onSubmit` | `Action` | no | — | Fired on form submission. |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "form",
  "showErrorsOn": "submit",
  "onSubmit": {
    "type": "tool", "tool": "submitRegistration", "params": "{{form.data}}"
  },
  "children": [
    { "type": "textInput", "label": "Email", "value": "{{form.email}}" },
    { "type": "textInput", "label": "Password",
      "value": "{{form.password}}", "obscureText": true },
    { "type": "button", "label": "Submit",
      "onTap": { "type": "form", "action": "submit" } }
  ]
}
```

## `gauge`  *(advanced · Core · v1.0)*

Radial gauge for a value within a range.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `value` | `number` | yes | — | Current value |
| `min` | `number` | no | 0 | Range minimum |
| `max` | `number` | no | 100 | Range maximum |
| `segments` | ``Segment[]`` | no | — | Color segments with `from`, `to`, `color` |
| `size` | `number` | no | 200 | Diameter (logical px) |
| `strokeWidth` | `number` | no | 20 | Arc thickness |
| `backgroundColor` | `string` | no | #E0E0E0 | Track color |
| `valueColor` | `string` | no | theme primary | Value arc color (when no segments) |
| `showLabel` | `boolean` | no | true | Show numeric label |
| `labelFormat` | `string` | no | {value} | Label format pattern |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "gauge",
  "value": 72,
  "min": 0,
  "max": 100,
  "segments": [
    { "from": 0, "to": 30, "color": "#F44336" },
    { "from": 30, "to": 70, "color": "#FF9800" },
    { "from": 70, "to": 100, "color": "#4CAF50" }
  ],
  "size": 200,
  "strokeWidth": 20,
  "showLabel": true,
  "labelFormat": "{value}%",
  "startAngle": 135,
  "sweepAngle": 270
}
```

## `graph`  *(advanced · Core · v1.0)*

Time-series / numeric data graph (line, bar, area, scatter) drawn on a single set of axes. For node/edge topology visualization use `networkGraph` (§10.13).

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |

| `width` | `number` | no | 300 | Render width in logical px. |

| `strokeWidth` | `number` | no | 2 | Line stroke thickness. |

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
  "cellSize": 40,

  "showValues": true
```

## `icon`  *(display · Core)*

Displays an icon. The `icon` property accepts three forms so authors can
pick the lightest option for the asset they need:

1. **Named (built-in)** — a string that matches a Material Icon name in the
   runtime's resolver table (e.g. `"home"`, `"folder_open"`). Zero-cost;
   common icons are always available.
2. **Codepoint** — object `{codepoint, fontFamily?, fontPackage?}` for any
   Material Icons codepoint that isn't in the name table
   (`{"codepoint": 0xe88a}` renders the same glyph as `"home"`).
3. **URL** — string starting with `http://` / `https://` (SVG or raster
   image). The runtime fetches and caches the asset at first render; no
   bundled asset needed. Useful for app-specific or third-party icon sets.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `icon` | `string | object` | yes | — | Name (`"home"`), URL (`"https://.../icon.svg"`), or codepoint object (`{codepoint: 0xe88a}`). |
| `size` | `string` | no | — | Icon size. Accepts either a numeric dp value or an `AppIconSizes` token shorthand (`sm` / `md` / `lg` / `xl`) which scales with the active form factor.  |
| `sizeToken` | `string` | no | — | Responsive icon-size token. Equivalent to passing the same string via `size`; resolves through `AppIconSizes.of(context)` and tracks the form-factor scale (compact / medium / desktop / embedded).  |
| `color` | `Color` | no | — | Icon color. Applied to named / codepoint forms; for URL form it tints raster icons when supported. |

### Examples

#### `named`

```json
{ "type": "icon", "icon": "home", "size": 24, "color": "#2196F3" }
```

#### `codepoint`

```json
{ "type": "icon", "icon": { "codepoint": 59530 }, "size": 24 }
```

#### `url`

```json
{ "type": "icon", "icon": "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/google/material-design-icons/master/png/action/settings/materialicons/48dp/2x/baseline_settings_black_48dp.png", "size": 32 }
```

## `lazy`  *(advanced · Core · v1.0)*

Defer rendering of an expensive subtree until it enters the viewport (or until explicitly loaded). `lazy` belongs to the Utility group in [`02_Widgets.md`](02_Widgets.md) and is listed here because its schema pairs conceptually with the heavy Advanced widgets above.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `placeholder` | `Widget` | no | — | Rendered while `content` is not yet materialized |
| `content` | `Widget | object` | no | — | Inline widget, or `{ source: "ui://..." }` to fetch a remote page fragment. Required when `children` is omitted. |
| `children` | `Widget[]` | no | — | Multiple deferred widgets; runtime wraps them in a linear column. |
| `trigger` | `string` | no | viewport | `viewport` renders when scrolled into view; `immediate` renders on mount; `manual` renders when a `load()` signal is received. |
| `onLoad` | `Action` | no | — | Fired after `content` is materialized |
| `onError` | `Action` | no | — | Fired if `content` fetch fails; `event.error` |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "lazy",
  "placeholder": {
    "type": "box",
    "height": 200,
    "child": { "type": "progressBar" }
  },
  "content": {
    "source": "ui://pages/heavy-component"
  }
}
```

#### `prose_example_1`

```json
{
  "type": "lazy",
  "placeholder": {
    "type": "box",
    "height": 120,
    "child": { "type": "text", "text": "Loading chart…" }
  },
  "content": {
    "type": "chart",
    "chartType": "line",
    "data": "{{salesData}}"
  }
}
```

---

## `limitedBox`  *(utility · Core)*

Limits a child's size only when it would otherwise be unbounded.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `maxWidth` | `number` | no | double.infinity | Upper bound when width is unbounded. |
| `maxHeight` | `number` | no | double.infinity | Upper bound when height is unbounded. |
| `child` | `Widget` | yes | — | Bounded child. |

---

## `linear`  *(layout · Core)*

**Aliases:** `row`, `column`

Linear (flex) layout along a single axis. Replaces separate `row` / `column` widgets — use `direction: "horizontal"` or `direction: "vertical"`.

Main-axis sizing: when at least one child is `expanded` / `flexible` / `spacer` (or carries a `flex` value), `linear` expands to fill the available main-axis space so those children can distribute the remainder; otherwise it shrink-wraps its children. Authors can override this with the explicit `mainAxisSize` property.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `mainAxisSize` | `string` | no | — | `max` fills the parent along `direction`; `min` shrink-wraps. Defaults to `max` when a flex child (`expanded`/`flexible`/`spacer`) is present, otherwise `min`. |
| `direction` *(aliases: `orientation`, `scrollDirection`)* | `string` | yes | "vertical" | `"horizontal"` or `"vertical"`. |
| `alignment` *(aliases: `crossAxisAlignment`)* | `string` | no | "start" | Cross-axis alignment: `start`, `center`, `end`, `stretch`. |
| `distribution` *(aliases: `mainAxisAlignment`)* | `string` | no | "start" | Main-axis distribution: `start`, `center`, `end`, `spaceBetween`, `spaceAround`, `spaceEvenly`. |
| `spacing` *(aliases: `gap`, `itemSpacing`)* | `number` | no | 0 | Gap between children in logical pixels. |
| `children` | `Widget[]` | yes | — | Child widgets arranged along `direction`. |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "linear",
  "direction": "vertical",
  "alignment": "center",
  "distribution": "start",
  "spacing": 12,
  "children": [
    { "type": "text", "text": "Title" },
    { "type": "text", "text": "Subtitle" }
  ]
}
```

#### `prose_example_1`

```json
{
  "type": "linear",
  "direction": "horizontal",
  "distribution": "spaceBetween",
  "children": [
    { "type": "text", "text": "Left" },
    { "type": "text", "text": "Right" }
  ]
}
```

---

## `list`  *(list · Core)*

**Aliases:** `listView`, `listview`

Scrollable linear collection rendered from an array binding.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `items` | `binding` | no | — | Array source. Required when `children` is omitted (dynamic list). |
| `itemTemplate` | `Widget` | no | — | Template rendered per bound item. Required with `items`. Iteration variables `item`, `index`, `isFirst`, `isLast`, `isEven`, `isOdd` are in scope. |
| `children` | `Widget[]` | no | — | Static list of widgets. Mutually exclusive with `items` + `itemTemplate`. |
| `spacing` | `number` | no | 0 | Gap between items. |
| `orientation` | `string` | no | "vertical" | `vertical` or `horizontal`. |
| `emptyMessage` | `string` | no | — | Displayed when the list is empty. |
| `itemExtent` | `number` | no | — | Fixed item size for performance. |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "list",
  "items": "{{users}}",
  "spacing": 8,
  "itemTemplate": {
    "type": "listItem",
    "title": "{{item.name}}",
    "subtitle": "{{item.email}}"
  }
}
```

## `listItem`  *(list · Core)*

**Aliases:** `listTile`, `list-tile`

Single row in a list with optional leading/trailing widgets. Replaces Material `listTile` naming.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `title` | `string | Widget` | no | — | Primary text, or an inline Widget for rich titles. |
| `subtitle` | `string | Widget` | no | — | Secondary text, or an inline Widget. |
| `leading` | `Widget` | no | — | Leading widget (icon, avatar). |
| `trailing` | `Widget` | no | — | Trailing widget. |
| `onTap` | `Action` | no | — | Tap handler. |
| `selected` | `boolean` | no | false | Selected state. |
| `enabled` | `boolean` | no | true | Whether the item is interactive. |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "listItem",
  "title": "{{item.name}}",
  "subtitle": "{{item.description}}",
  "leading": { "type": "avatar", "label": "{{item.initials}}" },
  "onTap": {
    "type": "navigation", "action": "push",
    "route": "/detail/{{item.id}}"
  }
}
```

## `map`  *(advanced · Core · v1.0)*

Geographic map with markers and overlays.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `center` | ``{ latitude, longitude }`` | no | — | Map center coordinates. Required when flat `latitude` / `longitude` are omitted. |
| `latitude` | `number` | no | — | Flat shorthand for `center.latitude` — legacy alternative to `center`. |
| `longitude` | `number` | no | — | Flat shorthand for `center.longitude` — legacy alternative to `center`. |
| `zoom` | `number` | no | 13 | Zoom level (0–22) |
| `mapType` | `string` | no | standard | Base tile set. |
| `markers` | ``Marker[]`` | no | [] | Point markers |
| `markers[].id` | `string` | yes | — | Unique marker ID |
| `markers[].latitude` | `number` | yes | — | Marker latitude |
| `markers[].longitude` | `number` | yes | — | Marker longitude |
| `markers[].label` | `string` | no | — | Marker label |
| `markers[].icon` | `string` | no | — | Icon name |
| `markers[].color` | `string` | no | — | Marker color |
| `overlays` | ``Overlay[]`` | no | [] | Polygon / polyline / circle overlays |
| `overlays[].type` | `string` | yes | — | Overlay shape. |
| `overlays[].points` | ``{ latitude, longitude }[]`` | no | required for polygon/polyline | Vertex list |
| `overlays[].fillColor` | `string` | no | — | Fill color (polygon/circle) |
| `overlays[].strokeColor` | `string` | no | — | Stroke color |
| `overlays[].strokeWidth` | `number` | no | 1 | Stroke width |
| `onMarkerTap` | `Action` | no | — | Fired on marker tap; `event.id` is the marker ID |
| `onMapTap` | `Action` | no | — | Fired on map tap; `event.latitude` / `event.longitude` |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "map",
  "center": { "latitude": 37.5665, "longitude": 126.9780 },
  "zoom": 13,
  "mapType": "standard",
  "markers": [
    {
      "id": "m1",
      "latitude": 37.5665,
      "longitude": 126.9780,
      "label": "Seoul City Hall",
      "icon": "location_pin",
      "color": "#F44336"
    },
    {
      "id": "m2",
      "latitude": 37.5512,
      "longitude": 126.9882,
      "label": "Namsan Tower"
    }
  ],
  "overlays": [
    {
      "type": "polygon",
      "points": [
        { "latitude": 37.570, "longitude": 126.975 },
        { "latitude": 37.570, "longitude": 126.985 },
        { "latitude": 37.560, "longitude": 126.985 }
      ],
      "fillColor": "rgba(33,150,243,0.3)",
      "strokeColor": "#2196F3",
      "strokeWidth": 2
    }
  ],
  "onMarkerTap": {
    "type": "state", "action": "set",
    "binding": "selectedMarker", "value": "{{event.id}}"
  }
}
```

## `margin`  *(layout · Core)*

Applies outer margin around a single child.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `margin` *(aliases: `value`)* | `EdgeInsets` | yes | — | Outer margin. |
| `child` | `Widget` | yes | — | Child widget. |

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{ "type": "margin", "margin": { "all": 16 },
  "child": { "type": "text", "text": "With outer margin" } }
```

## `markdown`  *(advanced · Core · v1.0)*

Markdown renderer.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `text` | `string ` | no | binding | required | Markdown source |
| `selectable` | `boolean` | no | false | Allow text selection |
| `width` | `number` | no | — | Widget width |
| `height` | `number` | no | — | Widget height |
| `fontSize` | `number` | no | — | Base font size |
| `textColor` | `string` | no | — | Default text color |
| `linkColor` | `string` | no | — | Hyperlink color |
| `codeBackgroundColor` | `string` | no | — | Code-block background |
| `onLinkTap` | `Action` | no | — | Fired on link tap; `event.url` is the target |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "markdown",
  "text": "# Hello World\n\nThis is **markdown** content with [a link](https://example.com).",
  "selectable": true,
  "width": 600,
  "fontSize": 16,
  "textColor": "#212121",
  "linkColor": "#1976D2",
  "codeBackgroundColor": "#F5F5F5",
  "onLinkTap": {
    "type": "navigation", "action": "push",
    "route": "{{event.url}}"
  }
}
```

## `mediaPlayer`  *(advanced · Core · v1.0)*

Audio / video player widget.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `source` *(aliases: `src`)* | `string` | yes | — | Media URL (`bundle://`, `https://`, `client://`) |
| `mediaType` | `string` | no | inferred | Media kind. |
| `autoPlay` | `boolean` | no | false | Start playing automatically |
| `loop` | `boolean` | no | false | Loop at end |
| `muted` | `boolean` | no | false | Start muted |
| `volume` | `number` | no | 1.0 | Volume 0.0–1.0 |
| `controls` | `boolean` | no | true | Show native controls |
| `poster` | `string` | no | — | Poster image (video only) |
| `width` | `number` | no | — | Display width |
| `height` | `number` | no | — | Display height |
| `onPlay` | `Action` | no | — | Fired when playback starts |
| `onPause` | `Action` | no | — | Fired when playback pauses |
| `onEnded` | `Action` | no | — | Fired when media ends |
| `onTimeUpdate` | `Action` | no | — | Fired on time update; `event.currentTime` in seconds |
| `onError` | `Action` | no | — | Fired on playback error; `event.error` |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "mediaPlayer",
  "source": "bundle://assets/intro.mp4",
  "mediaType": "video",
  "autoPlay": false,
  "loop": false,
  "muted": false,
  "volume": 0.8,
  "controls": true,
  "poster": "bundle://assets/intro_poster.png",
  "width": 640,
  "height": 360,
  "onPlay": { "type": "state", "action": "set", "binding": "isPlaying", "value": true },
  "onPause": { "type": "state", "action": "set", "binding": "isPlaying", "value": false },
  "onEnded": { "type": "state", "action": "set", "binding": "isPlaying", "value": false },
  "onTimeUpdate": {
    "type": "state", "action": "set", "binding": "currentTime", "value": "{{event.currentTime}}"
  }
}
```

---

## `mediaQuery`  *(utility · Core)*

Responsive widget that inspects the current layout context and picks a child based on media-query conditions. Supports a `then`/`else` expression form and a `breakpoints` map form. The binding engine exposes `{{media.width}}`, `{{media.height}}`, `{{media.orientation}}` inside `condition`.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `condition` | `object | binding` | no | — | Boolean expression (string) or constraint object like `{minWidth, maxWidth}`; selects `then` when truthy. |
| `then` | `Widget` | no | — | Rendered when `condition` is truthy. |
| `else` | `Widget` | no | — | Rendered when `condition` is falsy. Legacy alias: `orElse`. |
| `breakpoints` | `object` | no | — | Map of breakpoint name → Widget (e.g., `{ "sm": ..., "md": ... }`). |
| `defaultChild` | `Widget` | no | — | Rendered when no breakpoint matches. |

---

## `navigationRail`  *(navigation · Core)*

Vertical navigation rail for tablet/desktop layouts. Each item's text field is `label`.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `selectedIndex` | `number | binding` | no | — | Currently selected item. |
| `items` *(aliases: `destinations`)* | `NavItem[]` | yes | — | `{ icon, label, route? }` entries. |
| `onChange` | `Action` | no | — | Fired when selection changes. |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "navigationRail",
  "selectedIndex": "{{selectedNavIndex}}",
  "items": [
    { "icon": "dashboard", "label": "Dashboard", "route": "/dashboard" },
    { "icon": "people",    "label": "Users",     "route": "/users" },
    { "icon": "settings",  "label": "Settings",  "route": "/settings" }
  ],
  "onChange": {
    "type": "navigation", "action": "push", "route": "{{event.route}}"
  }
}
```

Network topology graph. Same node/edge model as `graph`, with topology-oriented defaults (hierarchical layout, directed edges).

```json
  "type": "networkGraph",

  "directed": true
}
```

## `numberField`  *(input · Core)*

Specialized input for numeric values. Shared rows per §2.6.0; `value` is `number`.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `binding` | `string` | no | — | State path bound two-way to the widget value (§2.6.0). Runtime reads/writes this path without requiring an explicit onChange. |
| `value` | `string | number | boolean | object | array` | no | — | One-way initial/display value (§2.6.0). Literal or `{{path}}`; used when `binding` is not set. |
| `enabled` | `boolean` | no | true | Whether the widget accepts user input (§2.6.0). Default `true`. |
| `onChange` | `Action` | no | — | Fired when the widget value changes (§2.6.0). Event payload exposes `event.value`. |
| `label` | `string` | no | — | Field label. |
| `min` | `number` | no | — | Minimum value. |
| `max` | `number` | no | — | Maximum value. |
| `step` | `number` | no | 1 | Increment size. |
| `decimalPlaces` | `number` | no | 0 | Decimal precision. |
| `prefix` | `string` | no | — | Leading display text (e.g., `"$"`). |
| `suffix` | `string` | no | — | Trailing display text. |
| `thousandSeparator` | `string` | no | — | Thousands separator for display. |

## `offlineFallback`  *(utility · Core)*

Swaps between an online widget and an offline fallback based on connectivity tracked by the runtime. Connectivity state may be pinned by an `isOnline` binding for tests.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `online` | `Widget` | no | — | Rendered while connectivity is available. |
| `offline` | `Widget` | no | — | Rendered while offline. |
| `message` | `string` | no | — | Message shown inside the offline state. |
| `icon` | `string` | no | — | Icon rendered in the default offline state. |
| `showRetry` | `boolean` | no | true | Whether to show a retry affordance. |
| `onRetry` | `Action` | no | — | Fired when the user taps retry. |
| `isOnline` | `boolean | binding` | no | — | Explicit connectivity override. |

## `opacity`  *(animation · Core · v1.3)*

Wraps a child with opacity, with optional animation.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `opacity` | `number | binding` | yes | — | Opacity in `0.0..1.0`. |
| `animated` | `boolean` | no | false | Animate opacity changes. |
| `duration` | `number` | no | 300 | Animation duration in milliseconds (when `animated: true`). |
| `curve` | `string` | no | "easeInOut" | Animation curve (when `animated: true`). |
| `child` | `Widget` | yes | — | Child widget. |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "opacity",
  "opacity": "{{item.isActive ? 1.0 : 0.3}}",
  "animated": true,
  "duration": 200,
  "child": {
    "type": "card",
    "child": { "type": "text", "text": "{{item.name}}" }
  }
}
```

## `permissionPrompt`  *(utility · Core)*

Presents a prompt for one or more client capabilities (e.g., clipboard, filesystem). See [`07_Security.md`](07_Security.md) for the permission vocabulary.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `permissions` | `string[]` | no | — | Permission identifiers (e.g., `["client.clipboard"]`). Required when `permissionType` is omitted. |
| `permissionType` | `string` | no | — | Single-permission shorthand for `permissions: [permissionType]`. |
| `style` | `string` | no | "inline" | `inline`, `dialog`, `banner`. |
| `title` | `string` | no | — | Prompt title. |
| `description` | `string` | no | — | Prompt body. |
| `icon` | `string` | no | — | Icon shown alongside the prompt. |
| `allowPartial` | `boolean` | no | false | Allow the user to grant a subset. |
| `onAllow` | `Action` | no | — | Fired when the user grants (all / partial per `allowPartial`). |
| `onDeny` | `Action` | no | — | Fired when the user denies. |

## `scrollBar`  *(scroll · Core)*

Wraps a scrollable child with a visible scroll bar.

The runtime MUST provide a shared scroll controller to both the scroll bar and its scrollable child. When `thumbVisibility` or `trackVisibility` is `true`, the controller is required to drive the visibility; omitting it is a runtime error. Authors SHOULD NOT manage the controller manually — the runtime injects it transparently so the child scrollable (`scrollView`, `singleChildScrollView`, `list`, `grid`, `pageView`) binds to the same position.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `thumbVisibility` | `boolean` | no | — | Whether the scroll thumb is always visible. |
| `trackVisibility` | `boolean` | no | — | Whether the scroll track is always visible. |
| `thickness` | `number` | no | — | Scroll bar thickness. |
| `radius` | `number` | no | — | Scroll bar corner radius. |
| `child` | `Widget` | no | — | Scrollable child. Required when `children` is omitted. |
| `children` | `Widget[]` | no | — | Multiple widgets; runtime wraps them in a linear column. Mutually exclusive with `child`. |

---

## `scrollView`  *(scroll · Core)*

Scrollable viewport wrapping a single child (virtualization not required).

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `direction` | `string` | no | "vertical" | `vertical` or `horizontal`. |
| `padding` | `EdgeInsets` | no | — | Inner padding. |
| `child` | `Widget` | no | — | Scrolled content. Required when `children` is omitted. |
| `children` | `Widget[]` | no | — | Multiple widgets; the runtime wraps them in a linear column along `direction`. Mutually exclusive with `child`. |

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `binding` | `binding` | no | — | Target binding for signature data (base64 PNG or SVG path). Required when capturing is needed; may be omitted for pure display. |

| `showClearButton` | `boolean` | no | true | Show a clear-signature button |
| `showGuide` | `boolean` | no | false | Show a signing guide line |
| `onSignatureEnd` | `Action` | no | — | Fired when a stroke completes |
| `onClear` | `Action` | no | — | Fired when the signature is cleared |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "signature",
  "binding": "{{signatureData}}",
  "penColor": "#000000",
  "penWidth": 2.0,
  "width": 400,
  "height": 200,
  "backgroundColor": "#FFFFFF",
  "borderColor": "#E0E0E0",
  "showClearButton": true,
  "showGuide": true,
  "onSignatureEnd": {
    "type": "state", "action": "set",
    "binding": "signatureData", "value": "{{event.value}}"
  },
  "onClear": {
    "type": "state", "action": "set",
    "binding": "signatureData", "value": null
  }
}
```

## `simpleDialog`  *(dialog · Core)*

Dialog presenting a list of options.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `title` | `string` | no | — | Dialog title. |
| `options` | `Option[]` | no | — | `{ value, label, icon? }` entries. Required when `children` is omitted. |
| `children` | `Widget[]` | no | — | Custom option widgets. Mutually exclusive with `options`. |
| `onSelect` | `Action` | no | — | Fired when an option is chosen. |

## `singleChildScrollView`  *(scroll · Core)*

Lightweight scrollable wrapper for a single child.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `direction` | `string` | no | "vertical" | Scroll direction. |
| `padding` | `EdgeInsets` | no | — | Inner padding. |
| `child` | `Widget` | no | — | Scrolled content. Required when `children` is omitted. |
| `children` | `Widget[]` | no | — | Multiple widgets; runtime wraps them in a linear column along `direction`. Mutually exclusive with `child`. |

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
  "type": "singleChildScrollView",

    "type": "linear", "direction": "vertical",
    "children": [

      { "type": "text", "text": "Second section" }
    ]
  }
}
```

## `slider`  *(input · Core)*

Continuous single-value selection. Shared rows per §2.6.0; `value` is `number`.

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `binding` | `string` | no | — | State path bound two-way to the widget value (§2.6.0). Runtime reads/writes this path without requiring an explicit onChange. |
| `value` *(aliases: `values`)* | `number` | no | — | Current numeric value (overrides shared contract to register `values` legacy alias). |
| `enabled` | `boolean` | no | true | Whether the widget accepts user input (§2.6.0). Default `true`. |
| `onChange` | `Action` | no | — | Fired when the widget value changes (§2.6.0). Event payload exposes `event.value`. |
| `min` | `number` | no | 0 | Minimum value. |
| `max` | `number` | no | 1 | Maximum value. |
| `divisions` | `number` | no | — | Number of discrete steps. |

## `stack`  *(layout · Core)*

Overlapping children. Non-positioned children align per `alignment`; positioned children use explicit offsets (see `positioned`).

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `alignment` | `string` | no | "topStart" | Alignment of non-positioned children: `topStart`, `topCenter`, `topEnd`, `centerStart`, `center`, `centerEnd`, `bottomStart`, `bottomCenter`, `bottomEnd`. |
| `fit` | `string` | no | "loose" | Sizing of non-positioned children: `loose`, `expand`, `passthrough`. |
| `children` | `Widget[]` | yes | — | Stacked children (rendered in order; later children render on top). |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "stack",
  "alignment": "topStart",
  "children": [
    { "type": "image", "src": "bundle://hero.png" },
    { "type": "positioned", "top": 8, "right": 8,
      "child": { "type": "badge", "label": "NEW" } }
  ]
}
```

## `stepper`  *(input · Core)*

Step-by-step wizard. Shared `binding` / `value` / `enabled` / `onChange` per §2.6.0 — the bound value is the **active step index** (integer). `binding` and `currentStep` are aliases: when `binding` is set, it takes effect; otherwise `currentStep` is read as a one-way property.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `binding` | `string` | no | — | State path bound two-way to the widget value (§2.6.0). Runtime reads/writes this path without requiring an explicit onChange. |
| `value` | `string | number | boolean | object | array` | no | — | One-way initial/display value (§2.6.0). Literal or `{{path}}`; used when `binding` is not set. |
| `enabled` | `boolean` | no | true | Whether the widget accepts user input (§2.6.0). Default `true`. |
| `onChange` | `Action` | no | — | Fired when the widget value changes (§2.6.0). Event payload exposes `event.value`. |
| `steps` | `Step[]` | yes | — | Each step: `{ title, subtitle?, state?, content, isActive? }`. |
| `currentStep` | `number | binding` | no | 0 | One-way legacy property. Use §2.6.0 `binding` for two-way behavior. |
| `stepperType` | `string` | no | "vertical" | `vertical` or `horizontal`. |
| `onStepTapped` | `Action` | no | — | Fired when a step header is tapped. Receives `{{event.index}}`. |
| `onStepContinue` | `Action` | no | — | Fired when the continue button is pressed. |
| `onStepCancel` | `Action` | no | — | Fired when the cancel button is pressed. |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "stepper",
  "binding": "wizard.currentStep",
  "steps": [
    { "title": "Account", "content": { "type": "text", "text": "..." } },
    { "title": "Profile", "content": { "type": "text", "text": "..." } }
  ]
}
```

---

## `tabBar`  *(navigation · Core)*

Horizontal tab selector. Each tab's text field is `label`.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `selectedIndex` | `number | binding` | no | 0 | Currently selected index. Defaults to 0 when omitted. |
| `tabs` | `Tab[]` | yes | — | `{ label, icon? }` entries. |
| `onChange` | `Action` | no | — | Fired when selection changes. |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "tabBar",
  "selectedIndex": "{{activeTab}}",
  "tabs": [
    { "label": "Overview" },
    { "label": "Activity" },
    { "label": "Settings" }
  ],
  "onChange": {
    "type": "state", "action": "set",
    "binding": "activeTab", "value": "{{event.index}}"
  }
}
```

Content area that displays widgets corresponding to the currently selected tab.

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|

| `children` | `Widget[]` | yes | — | One child per tab. |

## `table`  *(advanced · Core · v1.0)*

Layout table for arranging widgets in rows and columns. Not data-bound; each cell is a widget.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `rows` | ``{ cells: Widget[] }[]`` | yes | — | Row definitions |
| `border` | ``{ color, width }`` | no | — | Optional cell border |
| `defaultColumnWidth` | `string | number` | no | flex | `flex`, `intrinsic`, or a fixed number (logical px). |
| `defaultVerticalAlignment` | `string` | no | middle | Cell vertical alignment. |
| `columnWidths` | `object` | no | — | Map `columnIndex` → width override |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "table",
  "border": { "color": "#E0E0E0", "width": 1 },
  "defaultColumnWidth": "flex",
  "defaultVerticalAlignment": "middle",
  "rows": [
    {
      "cells": [
        { "type": "text", "text": "Name" },
        { "type": "textInput", "value": "{{name}}",
          "onChange": { "type": "state", "action": "set", "binding": "name", "value": "{{event.value}}" } }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cells": [
        { "type": "text", "text": "Email" },
        { "type": "textInput", "value": "{{email}}",
          "onChange": { "type": "state", "action": "set", "binding": "email", "value": "{{event.value}}" } }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

## `terminal`  *(advanced · Core · v1.0)*

ANSI-capable terminal emulator.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `lines` | `binding` | no | — | Output lines array (ANSI-escaped strings accepted) |
| `prompt` | `string` | no | $ | Input prompt prefix |
| `showInput` | `boolean` | no | true | Render an input line |
| `maxLines` | `number` | no | — | Scrollback retention cap |
| `width` | `number` | no | — | Widget width |
| `height` | `number` | no | — | Widget height |
| `fontSize` | `number` | no | — | Font size (logical px) |
| `backgroundColor` | `string` | no | — | Terminal background |
| `textColor` | `string` | no | — | Default text color |
| `promptColor` | `string` | no | — | Prompt color |
| `onCommand` | `Action` | no | — | Fired on Enter; `event.value` is the submitted command |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "terminal",
  "lines": "{{terminalHistory}}",
  "prompt": "$ ",
  "showInput": true,
  "maxLines": 1000,
  "width": 600,
  "height": 400,
  "fontSize": 14,
  "backgroundColor": "#1E1E1E",
  "textColor": "#D4D4D4",
  "promptColor": "#4EC9B0",
  "onCommand": {
    "type": "tool",
    "tool": "executeCommand",
    "params": { "command": "{{event.value}}" }
  }
```

## `text`  *(display · Core)*

Renders a string. The canonical content field is `text`.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `text` *(aliases: `content`)* | `string` | yes | — | Text content. Supports binding expressions. |
| `variant` | `string` | no | — | M3 typography role. The runtime resolves it through `theme.typography.<variant>` (see `05_Theme.md` § 5.4) and uses the result as the base TextStyle. Inline `style` (if present) overrides individual fields on top of the resolved role.  |
| `style` | `string` | no | — | `fontSize`, `fontWeight`, `color`, `fontFamily`, `letterSpacing`, `lineHeight`, `decoration`. Object form is layered on top of `variant` when both are set. String form is a binding expression that resolves to a typography object — typically `"{{theme.typography.<role>}}"`, equivalent to writing `variant: "<role>"`.  |
| `maxLines` | `number` | no | — | Maximum rendered lines. |
| `overflow` | `string` | no | "clip" | `clip`, `ellipsis`, `fade`, `visible`. |
| `textAlign` | `string` | no | "start" | `start`, `center`, `end`, `justify`. |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "text",
  "text": "Hello {{user.name}}",
  "style": { "fontSize": 16, "fontWeight": "bold", "color": "#333333" }
}
```

---

## `textInput`  *(input · Core · v1.0)*

**Aliases:** `textField`, `textfield`, `textFormField`, `text-form-field`

Single-line (or multi-line when `maxLines > 1`) text entry. Follows the
shared input contract (spec §2.6.0): when `binding` is set, the runtime
reads the current value from the state path and writes user input back
without requiring an explicit `onChange`. Explicit `value` + `onChange`
override the shorthand.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `binding` | `string` | no | — | State path bound two-way to the input value. |
| `value` | `string | binding` | no | — | One-way initial/display value when `binding` is not set. |
| `enabled` | `boolean` | no | true | Whether the field accepts user input. |
| `onChange` | `Action` | no | — | Fired when the widget value changes (§2.6.0). Event payload exposes `event.value`. |
| `label` | `string` | no | — | Field label shown above or floating inside the field. |
| `placeholder` *(aliases: `hint`)* | `string` | no | — | Placeholder shown when the field is empty. |
| `helperText` | `string` | no | — | Helper text shown below the field. |
| `prefixIcon` | `string` | no | — | Icon displayed at the start of the field. |
| `suffixIcon` | `string` | no | — | Icon displayed at the end of the field. |
| `obscureText` | `boolean` | no | false | Hide input characters (passwords). |
| `readOnly` | `boolean` | no | false | Whether the field is read-only. |
| `maxLines` | `integer` | no | 1 | Maximum number of visible lines. |
| `maxLength` | `integer` | no | — | Maximum character length enforced at input time. |
| `inputType` | `string` | no | text | Virtual keyboard hint / input semantics. |
| `validation` | `ValidationConfig` | no | — | Input constraints; see `../../07_Security.md` §7.2.1. |

### Events

| Name | Payload | Aliases |
|---|---|---|
| `onChange` | `value: string`, `type: change` | `onChanged`, `change` |
| `onSubmit` | `value: string`, `type: submit` | `submit` |
| `onFocus` | `type: focus` | — |
| `onBlur` | `value: string`, `type: blur` | `blur` |

### Examples

#### `binding_only`

Canonical binding shorthand — runtime hydrates + writes back automatically.


```json
{
  "type": "textInput",
  "label": "Email",
  "binding": "form.email",
  "inputType": "email"
}
```

#### `validation_email`

Shape B validation (rule array).


```json
{
  "type": "textInput",
  "label": "Email",
  "binding": "form.email",
  "validation": [
    { "rule": "required", "message": "Email is required" },
    { "rule": "email",    "message": "Invalid email format" }
  ]
}
```

#### `explicit_value_onChange`

Opts out of binding shorthand — explicit `value` + `onChange`.


```json
{
  "type": "textInput",
  "value": "{{form.query}}",
  "onChange": {
    "type": "state",
    "action": "set",
    "binding": "form.query",
    "value": "{{event.value}}"
  }
}
```

#### `missing_type` — **expected: validation_error** at `#/required/type`

`type` missing — top-level validation error.


```json
{ "label": "Oops" }
```

#### `bad_input_type` — **expected: validation_error** at `#/properties/inputType/enum`

`inputType` must be one of the enum values.


```json
{ "type": "textInput", "inputType": "currency" }
```

Time input. Shared rows per §2.6.0; `value` is a time string (e.g., `"14:30"`).

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |

| `onChange` | `Action` | no | — | Fired when the widget value changes (§2.6.0). Event payload exposes `event.value`. |

| `mode` | `string` | no | "spinner" | `spinner`, `input`, `dial`. |

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |

| `value` | `string | number | boolean | object | array` | no | — | One-way initial/display value (§2.6.0). Literal or `{{path}}`; used when `binding` is not set. |
| `enabled` | `boolean` | no | true | Whether the widget accepts user input (§2.6.0). Default `true`. |
| `onChange` | `Action` | no | — | Fired when the widget value changes (§2.6.0). Event payload exposes `event.value`. |

## `transform`  *(animation · Core · v1.3)*

Geometric transformation (rotate, scale, translate) applied to a child.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `rotate` | `number` | no | 0 | Rotation in radians. |
| `scale` | `number | object` | no | 1 | Uniform scale, or `{ x, y }` non-uniform scale. |
| `translate` | `object` | no | — | `{ x, y }` offset in logical pixels. |
| `origin` | `object` | no | { "x": 0.5, "y": 0.5 } | Transform origin as fraction. |
| `animated` | `boolean` | no | false | Animate transform changes. |
| `duration` | `number` | no | 300 | Animation duration in milliseconds. |
| `curve` | `string` | no | "easeInOut" | Animation curve. |
| `child` | `Widget` | yes | — | Child widget. |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "transform",
  "rotate": "{{local.isFlipped ? 3.14 : 0}}",
  "scale": "{{local.isHovered ? 1.05 : 1.0}}",
  "animated": true,
  "duration": 300,
  "child": {
    "type": "card",
    "child": { "type": "text", "text": "{{title}}" }
  }
}
```
