## `tree`  *(advanced · Core · v1.0)*

Hierarchical tree view with expandable nodes.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `data` | `array | binding` | yes | — | Hierarchical data; each node MAY carry a `children` array. Literal array or binding. |
| `childrenKey` | `string` | no | children | Field name of the children array |
| `indentation` | `number` | no | 24 | Per-depth horizontal indentation in logical pixels. |
| `itemPadding` | `EdgeInsets` | no | — | Padding applied inside every tree row (expandable and leaf). Defaults to `{vertical: 4, right: 8}`. Adjust the vertical component to change row height / density. |
| `itemTemplate` | `Widget` | no | — | Template rendered per node; `{{item}}` is node data. Falls back to a default list-item renderer when omitted. |
| `expandable` | `boolean` | no | true | Allow expand/collapse |
| `initiallyExpanded` | `boolean` | no | false | Expand all nodes on mount |
| `selectable` | `boolean` | no | false | Whether a node can be selected by tap. |
| `showLines` | `boolean` | no | true | Draw connector lines between parent and leaf nodes. |
| `selectedColor` | `Color` | no | — | Background color of the currently selected row. |
| `lineColor` | `Color` | no | — | Color of connector lines when `showLines` is true. |
| `width` | `number` | no | — | Fixed widget width in logical pixels. |
| `height` | `number` | no | — | Fixed widget height in logical pixels. |
| `onNodeTap` | `Action` | no | — | Fired on node tap |
| `onSelect` | `Action` | no | — | Fired when a node is selected (requires `selectable: true`). Event payload is the node object. |
| `onExpand` | `Action` | no | — | Fired on node expand; `event.id` |
| `onCollapse` | `Action` | no | — | Fired on node collapse; `event.id` |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "tree",
  "data": "{{fileStructure}}",
  "expandable": true,
  "childrenKey": "children",
  "itemTemplate": {
    "type": "listItem",
    "title": "{{item.name}}",
    "leading": { "type": "icon", "icon": "{{item.icon}}" }
  },
  "onNodeTap": {
    "type": "state", "action": "set",
    "binding": "selectedNodeId", "value": "{{event.id}}"
  }
}
```

---

## `use`  *(utility · Core)*

Instantiates a named template (see §9.6).

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `template` | `string` | yes | — | Template name to instantiate. |
| `params` | `object` | no | — | Parameter values; merged with the template's declared defaults. |
| `slots` | `object` | no | — | Widget subtrees keyed by slot name. |

---

## `verticalDivider`  *(display · Core)*

Vertical separator, typically used in horizontal layouts.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `width` | `number` | no | — | Total width including spacing. |
| `thickness` | `number` | no | 1 | Line thickness. |
| `color` | `string` | no | — | Line color. |
| `indent` | `number` | no | — | Top indent. |
| `endIndent` | `number` | no | — | Bottom indent. |

---

## `visibility`  *(layout · Core)*

Shows or hides a child with optional state preservation and replacement content.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `visible` | `boolean | binding` | no | true | Whether the child is visible. Defaults to `true` when omitted. |
| `maintainSize` | `boolean` | no | false | Keep space allocated when hidden. |
| `maintainState` | `boolean` | no | false | Preserve `child` state when hidden. Does not affect `replacement`, which is built fresh each time it is shown. |
| `replacement` | `Widget` | no | — | Widget shown in place of `child` when `visible` is `false`. When absent, the child is simply hidden in-place (respecting `maintainSize` / `maintainState`). |
| `child` | `Widget` | no | — | Primary widget. Required when `children` is omitted. |
| `children` | `Widget[]` | no | — | Multiple widgets; runtime wraps them in a linear column. Mutually exclusive with `child`. |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "visibility",
  "visible": "{{showControls}}",
  "maintainState": true,
  "child": { "type": "button", "label": "Hide me" }
}
```

---

## `webView`  *(advanced · Core · v1.0)*

Embedded web view.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `url` | `string` | no | null (if html set) | URL to load |
| `html` | `string` | no | null (if url set) | Raw HTML content — alternative to `url` |
| `allowNavigation` | `boolean` | no | true | Allow link navigation within the view |
| `enableJavaScript` | `boolean` | no | true | Enable JavaScript |
| `enableZoom` | `boolean` | no | true | Allow pinch-to-zoom |
| `width` | `number` | no | — | Widget width |
| `height` | `number` | no | — | Widget height |
| `onPageStarted` | `Action` | no | — | Fired when loading starts |
| `onPageFinished` | `Action` | no | — | Fired when loading finishes |
| `onError` | `Action` | no | — | Fired on load error; `event.error` |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "webView",
  "url": "https://example.com",
  "allowNavigation": true,
  "enableJavaScript": true,
  "enableZoom": true,
  "width": 600,
  "height": 400,
  "onPageStarted": {
    "type": "state", "action": "set",
    "binding": "webViewLoading", "value": true
  },
  "onPageFinished": {
    "type": "state", "action": "set",
    "binding": "webViewLoading", "value": false
  },
  "onError": {
    "type": "state", "action": "set",
    "binding": "webViewError", "value": "{{event.error}}"
  }
}
```

---

## `wrap`  *(layout · Core)*

Flow layout that wraps children to the next line when they exceed available width/height.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `direction` | `string` | no | "horizontal" | Primary flow direction. |
| `spacing` | `number` | no | 0 | Gap between children on the same run. |
| `runSpacing` | `number` | no | 0 | Gap between runs. |
| `alignment` | `string` | no | "start" | Alignment within a run. |
| `children` | `Widget[]` | yes | — | Children to wrap. |
